content: Phase MLB-V3.1 — baseball_historical.py: fetch_team_last_games (MLB Stats API primary + API-Sports fallback) + compute_baseball_profile()
Phase MLB-V3.2 — baseball_runs_rescue.py: baseballRunsRescueLayer() with trap signals (Total Runs O/U, Team Totals, F5, Run Line +1.5)
Phase MLB-V3.3 — Wire enrichment into mlb_day_orchestrator.py (parallel + fail-soft) + attach baseballHistoricalProfile to pick
Phase MLB-V4.1 — mlb_feedback_loop.py: record_outcome, recompute_weights, persistent mlb_engine_weights collection
Phase MLB-V4.2 — Endpoint POST /api/mlb/picks/{pick_id}/settle + extend pick_tracking + new mlb_pick_feedback collection
Phase MLB-V4.3 — v2 module reads weights from mlb_engine_weights (fall back to defaults)
